allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Refactor: Make branding and paths ENV-driven via .env configuration

This refactor enables dynamic branding through environment variables instead of 
hardcoded strings. The setup script now reads BRAND_NAME, BRAND_SLUG, INSTALL_PATH, 
and SERVICE_USER from .env to customize the installation per deployment.

Changes:
- Extended .env.example with comprehensive branding and path variables
- Updated config/settings.py to load all branding from ENV with sensible defaults
- Modified setup script \(setup_synctacles_server_v2.3.4.sh\) to use ENV variables:
  * Dynamically sets INSTALL_PATH, SERVICE_USER, and BRAND_SLUG
  * All hardcoded paths \(/opt/synctacles, /opt/github/synctacles-repo\) now use variables
  * Database user/group derived from SERVICE_USER ENV variable
  * Systemd services and paths customizable via .env
- Updated FastAPI app to use branding from settings for dynamic title/description
- Updated Home Assistant manifest.json domain and URLs
- Updated HA component const.py to use dynamic domain

Benefits:
- Same repository can be deployed with different branding/paths via .env
- Server setup script automatically respects environment configuration
- All brand-related strings centralized in .env and config/settings.py
- Backward compatible with existing deployments \(sensible defaults\)

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code]\(https://claude.com/claude-code\)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Haiku 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(su - energy-insights-nl -c "
cd /opt/github/ha-energy-insights-nl
git add -A
git commit -m ''F7: Technical hardening - caching, deploy/maintenance scripts

- Added in-memory caching for API endpoints \(TTL: 1-60 min\)
- Created deploy.sh with backup and rollback support
- Created rollback.sh for quick recovery
- Created backup.sh + restore.sh for database
- Created health-check.sh for monitoring
- Created validate_setup.sh for setup verification
- Added daily backup cron job \(03:00\)

Scripts structure:
  scripts/deploy/      - deploy.sh, rollback.sh
  scripts/maintenance/ - backup.sh, restore.sh, health-check.sh
  scripts/validation/  - validate_setup.sh''
git push origin main
")
Bash(1 echo "" echo "Cron job configuration:" crontab -l)
Bash(__NEW_LINE__ echo "✅ Cache werkt \(2e request sneller\)")
Bash(__NEW_LINE__ echo "✅ ./scripts/deploy/deploy.sh bestaat en is executable")
Bash(__NEW_LINE__ echo "✅ Cron job voor daily backup actief")
Bash(__NEW_LINE__ echo "✅ Alles gecommit en gepusht naar GitHub")

Bash(sudo bash -c 'cat >> /etc/sysctl.conf << '"''"'EOF'"''"'

# SYNCTACLES Performance Tuning \(2025-12-30\)
net.ipv4.tcp_tw_reuse = 1
net.ipv4.tcp_fin_timeout = 30
net.core.somaxconn = 4096
net.ipv4.tcp_max_syn_backlog = 4096
EOF')

Bash(sudo bash -c 'cat > /etc/systemd/system/energy-insights-nl-api.service << '"''"'EOF'"''"'
[Unit]
Description=Energy Insights NL API
After=network.target postgresql.service
Requires=postgresql.service

[Service]
Type=simple
User=energy-insights-nl
Group=energy-insights-nl
WorkingDirectory=/opt/energy-insights-nl/app
Environment=""PATH=/opt/energy-insights-nl/venv/bin""
EnvironmentFile=/opt/.env
ExecStart=/opt/energy-insights-nl/venv/bin/gunicorn \\
    --bind 127.0.0.1:8000 \\
    --workers 8 \\
    --worker-class uvicorn.workers.UvicornWorker \\
    --worker-connections 1024 \\
    --keepalive 5 \\
    --backlog 2048 \\
    --timeout 30 \\
    --graceful-timeout 10 \\
    --access-logfile - \\
    --error-logfile - \\
    synctacles_db.api.main:app
Restart=always
RestartSec=5

[Install]
WantedBy=multi-user.target
EOF')

Bash(__NEW_LINE__ psql -U energy_insights_nl -d energy_insights_nl -c "
SELECT table_name 
FROM information_schema.tables 
WHERE table_schema = ''public''
ORDER BY table_name;")

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
chore: organize repository root - move reports to docs/

- Move completion reports \(FASE_*_COMPLETION_REPORT.md\) to docs/reports/
- Move planning documents \(CC_PLAN_*, VOORTGANGSRAPPORT_*\) to docs/reports/
- Move incident and diagnostic reports to docs/incidents/
- Remove temporary cc-task-* and CLAUDE_CODE_* files from root
- Add cc-task-*.md pattern to .gitignore for future development

Keeps root clean with only essential files \(README, LICENSE, requirements.txt\)
while preserving historical documentation in organized subdirectories.

EOF
\)")

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
feat: graceful degradation + options flow for key reconfiguration

- FIX 1: TenneT coordinator failures no longer crash entire integration
  - Wrap TenneT refresh in try/except
  - Set tennet_coordinator=None on failure, continue with server data
  - Server sensors \(generation, load, prices\) remain available
  - Improve error handling and logging

- FIX 2: Add options flow for runtime configuration updates
  - Users can now reconfigure API URL, API Key, TenneT Key via UI
  - Accessible via Settings > Devices & Services > Configure
  - Identical validation as initial config flow
  - Auto-reload coordinators with new credentials
  - Defaults show current configuration

Additional improvements:
- Poll interval optimization: Server 10min, TenneT 5min \(6x reduction\)
- Enhanced diagnostics with data freshness timestamps
- Consistent Load API response format with Generation/Prices
- TenneT age_seconds calculation in sensor attributes

🤖 Generated with Claude Code

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
Bash(sudo -u energy-insights-nl git -C /opt/github/ha-energy-insights-nl push origin main)

Bash(sudo -u energy-insights-nl git -C /opt/github/ha-energy-insights-nl commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
feat: add async_reload_entry support for HA integration

- Add async_reload_entry\(\) function to __init__.py
- Enables runtime reload of integration without HA restart
- All other HA best practices already implemented:
  - SensorStateClass.MEASUREMENT for all sensors
  - Unique IDs via EnergyInsightsBaseSensor base class
  - Device grouping under "Energy Insights NL"
  - Icons for all 10 sensor types
  - Device classes \(POWER, MONETARY, etc.\)
  - Native units of measurement

This completes HA finalization standards v2.0.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code]\(https://claude.com/claude-code\)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Haiku 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
